untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cross-market price divergence detection across multiple venues and real-time bid-ask spread comparison. The backtest engine operates on single-market OHLCV data only. Required inputs: (1) real-time price feeds from 2+ markets simultaneously, (2) live bid-ask spreads from both markets, (3) mid-price calculations across venues, (4) latency-aware order execution logic. None of these multi-market microstructure capabilities are available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a statistical arbitrage / market microstructure signal requiring simultaneous data from multiple trading venues and real-time spread monitoring. It cannot be expressed using single-market technical indicators. Recommend: (a) implement as live trading strategy with direct exchange feeds, or (b) provide pre-calculated divergence metrics as a custom indicator.
